macue: Research and development of the Multi-modal Authenticity Capture in Untrusted Environments protocol, focusing on sensor fusion and anti-forgery forensic models
aead: Cryptographic sealing of media utilizing AEAD for secure binding of timestamp, GPS, and content metadata
jdos_scenery.mp4: Develoment of a bootloader and kernel with user-spaces, ATA, VGA, and JIT execution support
p2p: Design of decentralized peer-to-peer services and communication protocols to democratize privacy-preserving systems
misc: Miscellaneous technical projects including high-performance ASCII rendering engines and modular software experimentation.
